rationale: Identity matched and preliminary checks did not find confirmatory-family expansion, outcome-read evidence by the clean freeze, unfrozen thresholds, capacity mismatch, or fold-leakage defects. However, this reviewer opened score/rank-bearing top-five metadata during the scenario-membership source check, so the session cannot provide the required outcome-clean PASS.

conditions.condition: A fresh freeze reviewer must rerun from an outcome-clean session before Phase 4 formal result computation is unlocked.

Treat top-five README files, team README files, top5_selection_summary.csv, top5_scenario_scores.csv, validation_summary.csv, score_team_coverage.csv, and rank/score-bearing materialization metadata as denylisted unless a source inventory proves they are score/rank-free.
Derive scenario/family cell membership from outcome-free raw replay/session metadata or a newly generated outcome-free map; block if membership exists only in score-joined tables.
Install or restore scipy/matplotlib, run the real optimizer path, and reconfirm the sign contract on real theta outputs before any confirmatory NSFC result is trusted.

blocked_reason: Reviewer session outcome contamination from score/rank-bearing top-five metadata reads.
